summary: Applied two surgical seam fixes: restored explicit carryover of Noreen's noon Dev rendezvous from chapter 11, and tightened the handoff into chapter 13 by ending on Elsie's post-return money pressure.
edits: Added one early sentence linking the chapter-11 tail plan (Dev at twelve with Bhatti's van booking) to chapter-12 morning stakes.
Added one closing sentence showing Elsie turning home with dwindled coins and rent/coal arithmetic to bridge into chapter 13 opening.
